title: fix: SSO login SameSite cookie issue
description: Changes session cookie SameSite from Strict to Lax to allow SSO round-trip to complete. Fixes #1001.
author: kmonteiro-beu

title: WIP: fix petition counter real-time update
description: Wiring the petition counter component to Redux store instead of local state. Still in progress. Fixes #1002.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: expand Period 4 prompt list and add shuffle
description: Adds 8 new Period 4 prompts and shuffles the full list to prevent repeats at any n value. Fixes #1004.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: close mobile nav on link tap
description: Adds explicit close call to all nav link onClick handlers. Fixes #1005.
author: kmonteiro-beu

title: fix: presigned URL uses member role not IAM role
description: Changes get_role() call to get_membership_tier() so regular members receive valid presigned URLs. Fixes #1007.
author: kmonteiro-beu

title: feat: increase rate limit to 100 req/min per IP
description: Raises the per-IP rate limit from 20 to 100 requests per minute to support whole-class simultaneous API use. Fixes #1008.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: RSS feed null date frontmatter guard
description: Adds a null guard before .toISOString() in the RSS generator and falls back to file mtime. Fixes #1013.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: add Article 20 and Article 25 to grievance form
description: Adds 'Article 20 - Working Conditions and Hours' and 'Article 25 - Preparation Time' to the grievance form category dropdown. Fixes #1014.
author: drusso-apush

title: update: 2025-26 season roster and API params
description: Updates player IDs and season query parameters throughout the dashboard. Closes #1015.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: map outcome field in CSV serializer
description: Adds the outcome field to the CSV column map in the grievance serializer. Fixes #1010.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: normalize hyphenated names in dues reconciliation
description: Adds a name normalization step that strips hyphens and lowercases before matching CSV rows to member records. Closes #1016.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: correct Period 5 answer key typo
description: Replaces 'Compromise of 1850' with 'Missouri Compromise' on page 8 of the Period 5 DBQ packet. Closes #1018.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: CSS grid subgrid fallback for Safari 16
description: Replaces subgrid layout with a flex-based fallback that renders correctly on Safari 16. Closes #1012.
author: drusso-apush

title: WIP: feat dark mode with CSS custom properties
description: Prototype dark mode implementation using CSS custom property overrides. Background #1a1a2e, text #e0e0e0. Refs #1017.
author: pbhatt-ebhs

title: content: add 1919 Boston Police Strike primary sources
description: Adds 4 primary sources (Mayor Peters proclamation, AFL statement, BPD patrolman account, Boston Globe editorial) and a discussion guide. Refs #1006.
author: drusso-apush

title: feat: grievance status change email notifications
description: Implements Mailgun email notifications for grievance status transitions filed->in_review and in_review->resolved. Refs #1011.
author: drusso-apush

title: feat: add GitLab CI terraform plan pipeline
description: Adds .gitlab-ci.yml with plan stage on MR and apply stage on main merge for portal infrastructure. Refs #1020.
author: drusso-apush

title: fix: add WCAG alt text to historical photo embeds
description: Adds descriptive alt text to all historical photograph img tags in units 1-2. Units 3-6 in progress. Refs #1019.
author: drusso-apush

title: WIP: feat bulk download ZIP bundle
description: Generates a ZIP of all unit packets server-side and updates the Etsy full-year listing download URL. Automation for keeping ZIP in sync with individual file updates still in design. Refs #1009.
author: drusso-apush

title: feat: add History Club event archive page
description: Adds an archive page listing all past History Club events, field trips, and presentations going back to 2022.
author: drusso-apush
